name: Neuberger Berman MLP and Energy Income Fund Inc.
summary: Neuberger Berman MLP and Energy Income Fund Inc. is a closed ended fund of fund launched and managed by Neuberger Berman Management LLC. It is co-managed by Neuberger Berman LLC. The fund invests in the public equity markets. It primarily invests in master limited partnerships and limited liability companies. It was formerly known as Neuberger Berman MLP Income Fund Inc. Neuberger Berman MLP and Energy Income Fund Inc. was formed on November 16, 2012 and is domiciled in the United States.
